messages.content: You are a helpful assistant that formats phone numbers precisely as requested.

Convert the following contact numbers to E.164 and append the extension in the form ,ext=####. Output only the three formatted lines in the same order. Do not include names. No commentary, no extra spaces.
- For numbers without a country code, assume US (+1).
- For Chitra, country is IN (+91). The local number uses Bangalore area code 080.
- Preserve all digits; do not drop or change any digits. Remove formatting characters. Do not insert separators or pipes; output exactly the pattern <E.164>,ext=<extension> per line.

Contacts:
- Alice — (415) 555-2671 ext 204
- Bob — +44 20 7946 0958 x771
- Chitra — 080 7123 4455 ext 58 (country: IN)

Only output the three lines with the formatted numbers and extensions, in order.
